  "type.period": {
    "message": "Period",
    "description": "The period of the service."
  },
  "type.usage": {
    "message": "Quota",
    "description": "The quota of the service."
  },

    "message": "Shared",
    "description": "Badge on the application list marking an application that has been authorized to the current user by someone else (not owned by them)."
  },
  "field.expiredAt": {
    "message": "Expiration Time",
    "description": "The expiration time of the application."
  },
  "button.goDocument": {
    "message": "Document",
    "description": "Button text that navigates to the document page."
  },
  "button.goCredentials": {
    "message": "Keys",
    "description": "Button text that navigates to the credentials page. Must translate to 'Keys'."
  },
  "button.buyMore": {

  "name.text": {

  },
